title: Business 360 Search API Response
description: Response body from POST /search/public/api/v1/search. Contains search result records and pagination metadata. These fields are also exposed as operation attributes (hits, pageSize, pageOffset, recordsToReturn, recordOffset, maxRecords).

hits.description: Total number of records matching the search.

recordsToReturn.description: Number of records requested for this page.

records.description: List of matching business entity records. Fields depend on entity type.

items.description: Single record; structure varies by business entity (e.g. Person, Item, Organization).

totalCount.description: Total number of records matching the search (if present).

records.description: Alternative top-level records array when searchResult is not used.
